title: IC RegFin Legal, TT&A act on RAS Luxury Skincare Series B fundraise
description: RAS Beauty Private Limited has raised $7.5 million (~₹69 crore) from a Series B fundraise led by Dabur Ventures, an investment platform of Dabur India, with participation from existing investor Unilever Ventures.IC RegFin Legal advised RAS Luxury Skincare on this fundraise.The transaction team was led by Abhisshek Singlla (Partner), Prajjwal Sharma (Senior Associate), Rose Joby (Associate) and Vaishnavi Singh (Trainee Associate)Abhisshek SingllaTT&A advised Dabur India on this transacti
